hook.text: Reply to Shell McPhee's comment: Does endo in the POD get worse over time?
hook.emotional_mechanism_raw: addresses concern about disease progression, provides reassurance and education
hook.target_audience_raw: endometriosis patients or those concerned about disease progression in the pouch of Douglas

main_claim.text: Endometriosis in the pouch of Douglas can worsen over time if not managed or unresponsive to surgery.

supporting_explanation.summary: All endometriosis material, regardless of location, can get worse over time if not managed or if it doesn't respond well to surgical treatment.

funnel_rationale: Provides broad educational awareness about the progressive nature of endometriosis in a specific anatomical location, targeting general concern without pushing toward a specific service or appointment.

topic.primary_raw: Endometriosis progression in the pouch of Douglas
